description: Mercantile accounts in Judaeo-Arabic. The scribe often mixes up emphatic and non-emphatic consonants and omits the lamed of the definite article before sun letters. Dating: probably 11th or 12th century. The hand is likely known. Mentions Barsime(o) Robaldo al-Janawī (=the Genoese). Sal ammoniac (nushādir) is mentioned a few times.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
